mapper.select: select jobid, version, stepid, db, owner, table_name, pagitype, pagitypedetail, exetype, archiveflag, status, preceding, succedding, seq1, seq2, seq3, pipeline, pk_col, where_col, where_key_name, parallelcnt, commitcnt, wherestr, sqlstr, keymap_id, key_name, key_cols, key_refstr, sqltype, DATE_FORMAT(regdate,'%Y/%m/%d') as regdate, DATE_FORMAT(upddate,'%Y/%m/%d') as upddate, reguserid, upduserid, hintselect, hintinsert, uval1, uval2, uval3, uval4, uval5 from cotdl.tbl_piisteptable a where version in (select max(cast(version as INTEGER)) from cotdl.tbl_piisteptable where jobid = a.jobid and stepid = a.stepid ) order by jobid, stepid, seq1, seq2, seq3

select jobid, version, stepid, db, owner, table_name, pagitype, pagitypedetail, exetype, archiveflag, status, preceding, succedding, seq1, seq2, seq3, pipeline, pk_col, where_col, where_key_name, parallelcnt, commitcnt, wherestr, sqlstr, keymap_id, key_name, key_cols, key_refstr, sqltype, DATE_FORMAT(regdate,'%Y/%m/%d') as regdate, DATE_FORMAT(upddate,'%Y/%m/%d') as upddate, reguserid, upduserid, hintselect, hintinsert, uval1, uval2, uval3, uval4, uval5 from cotdl.tbl_piisteptable where jobid= #{jobid, jdbcType=VARCHAR} and version= #{version, jdbcType=VARCHAR} and stepid= #{stepid} order by jobid, stepid, seq1, seq2, seq3

select a.db, a.owner, a.table_name from cotdl.tbl_piisteptable a , COTDL.TBL_PIITABLE b where a.exetype = 'ARCHIVE' and b.db = 'DLMARC' and CONCAT('PII', a.owner) = b.owner and a.TABLE_NAME = b.table_name group by a.db, a.owner, a.table_name order by a.db, a.owner, a.table_name

select b.jobid, b.version, b.stepid, b.db, b.owner, b.table_name, b.pagitype, b.pagitypedetail, b.exetype, b.archiveflag, b.status, b.preceding, b.succedding, b.seq1, b.seq2, b.seq3, b.pipeline, b.pk_col, b.where_col, b.where_key_name, b.parallelcnt, b.commitcnt, b.wherestr, b.sqlstr, b.keymap_id, b.key_name, b.key_cols, b.key_refstr, b.sqltype, DATE_FORMAT(b.regdate,'%Y/%m/%d') as regdate, DATE_FORMAT(b.upddate,'%Y/%m/%d') as upddate, b.reguserid, bupduserid, bhintselect, bhintinsert, buval1, buval2, buval3, buval4, buval5 from cotdl.tbl_piijob a, cotdl.tbl_piisteptable b where a.jobid = b.jobid and a.version = b.version and a.jobtype='PII' and a.runtype='REGULAR' and a.status='ACTIVE' and b.exetype in ('DELETE','UPDATE')
order by jobid, stepid, seq1, seq2, seq3

select count(1) from cotdl.tbl_piijob a, cotdl.tbl_piisteptable b where a.jobid = b.jobid and a.version = b.version and a.jobtype='PII' and a.runtype='REGULAR' and a.status='ACTIVE' and b.exetype in ('DELETE','UPDATE')

select jobid, version, stepid, db, owner, table_name, pagitype, pagitypedetail, exetype, archiveflag, status, preceding, succedding, seq1, seq2, seq3, pipeline, pk_col, where_col, where_key_name, parallelcnt, commitcnt, wherestr, sqlstr, keymap_id, key_name, key_cols, key_refstr, sqltype, DATE_FORMAT(regdate,'%Y/%m/%d') as regdate, DATE_FORMAT(upddate,'%Y/%m/%d') as upddate, reguserid, upduserid, hintselect, hintinsert, uval1, uval2, uval3, uval4, uval5 from cotdl.tbl_piisteptable where 1=1
order by jobid, stepid, seq1, seq2, seq3

select distinct keymap_id, key_name, key_cols, pk_col from cotdl.tbl_piisteptable a where exetype='KEYMAP' and SUBSTRING(jobid, 1, 11) = SUBSTRING(#{jobid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 1, 11) and version in (select max(cast(version as INTEGER)) from cotdl.tbl_piijob where jobid = a.jobid and status='ACTIVE' ) order by key_cols
mapper.insert: insert into cotdl.tbl_piisteptable (jobid, version, stepid, db, owner, table_name, pagitype, pagitypedetail, exetype, archiveflag, status, preceding, succedding, seq1, seq2, seq3, pipeline, pk_col, where_col, where_key_name, parallelcnt, commitcnt, wherestr, sqlstr, keymap_id, key_name, key_cols, key_refstr, sqltype, regdate, upddate, reguserid, upduserid, hintselect, hintinsert, uval1, uval2, uval3, uval4, uval5) values (#{jobid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{version, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{stepid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{db, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{owner, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{table_name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{pagitype, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{pagitypedetail, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{exetype, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{archiveflag, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{preceding, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{succedding, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{seq1}, #{seq2}, #{seq3}, #{pipeline, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{pk_col, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{where_col, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{where_key_name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{parallelcnt, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{commitcnt, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{wherestr, jdbcType=CLOB}, #{sqlstr, jdbcType=CLOB}, #{keymap_id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{key_name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{key_cols, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{key_refstr, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sqltype, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, NOW(), NOW(), #{reguserid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{upduserid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{hintselect, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{hintinsert, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{uval1, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{uval2, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{uval3, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{uval4, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{uval5, jdbcType=VARCHAR})

insert into cotdl.tbl_piisteptable (jobid, version, stepid, db, owner, table_name, pagitype, pagitypedetail, exetype, archiveflag, status, preceding, succedding, seq1, seq2, seq3, pipeline, pk_col, where_col, where_key_name, parallelcnt, commitcnt, wherestr, sqlstr, keymap_id, key_name, key_cols, key_refstr, sqltype, regdate, upddate, reguserid, upduserid, hintselect, hintinsert, uval1, uval2, uval3, uval4, uval5) values (#{jobid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{version, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{stepid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{db, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{owner, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{table_name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{pagitype, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{pagitypedetail, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{exetype, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{archiveflag, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{preceding, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{succedding, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{seq1}, #{seq2}, #{seq3}, #{pipeline, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{pk_col, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{where_col, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{where_key_name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{parallelcnt, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{commitcnt, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{wherestr, jdbcType=CLOB}, #{sqlstr, jdbcType=CLOB}, #{keymap_id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{key_name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{key_cols, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{key_refstr, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sqltype, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, NOW(), NOW(), #{reguserid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{upduserid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{hintselect, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{hintinsert, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{uval1, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{uval2, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{uval3, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{uval4, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{uval5, jdbcType=VARCHAR})

insert into cotdl.tbl_piisteptable select jobid, cast(version as INTEGER)+1, stepid, db, owner, table_name, pagitype, pagitypedetail, exetype, archiveflag, status, preceding, succedding, seq1, seq2, seq3, pipeline, pk_col, where_col, where_key_name, parallelcnt, commitcnt, wherestr, sqlstr, keymap_id, key_name, key_cols, key_refstr, sqltype, regdate, NOW() as upddate, reguserid, upduserid, hintselect, hintinsert, uval1, uval2, uval3, uval4, uval5 from cotdl.tbl_piisteptable where jobid= #{jobid, jdbcType=VARCHAR} and version= #{version, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.delete: delete from cotdl.tbl_piisteptable where jobid= #{jobid, jdbcType=VARCHAR} and version= #{version, jdbcType=VARCHAR} and stepid= #{stepid}
delete from cotdl.tbl_piisteptable where jobid= #{jobid, jdbcType=VARCHAR} and version= #{version, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.update: update cotdl.tbl_piisteptable set db= #{db, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, owner= #{owner, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, table_name= #{table_name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, pagitype= #{pagitype, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, pagitypedetail= #{pagitypedetail, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, exetype= #{exetype, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, archiveflag= #{archiveflag, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, status= #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, preceding= #{preceding, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, succedding= #{succedding, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, seq1= #{seq1}, seq2= #{seq2_new}, seq3= #{seq3}, pipeline= #{pipeline, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, where_col= #{where_col, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, where_key_name= #{where_key_name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, parallelcnt= #{parallelcnt, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, commitcnt= #{commitcnt, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, pk_col= #{pk_col, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, wherestr= #{wherestr, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sqlstr= #{sqlstr, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, keymap_id= #{keymap_id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, key_name= #{key_name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, key_cols= #{key_cols, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, key_refstr= #{key_refstr, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sqltype= #{sqltype, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, upddate= NOW(), reguserid= #{reguserid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, upduserid= #{upduserid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, hintselect= #{hintselect, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, hintinsert= #{hintinsert, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, uval1= #{uval1, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, uval2= #{uval2, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, uval3= #{uval3, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, uval4= #{uval4, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, uval5= #{uval5, jdbcType=VARCHAR} where jobid= #{jobid, jdbcType=VARCHAR} and version= #{version, jdbcType=VARCHAR} and stepid= #{stepid} and seq1= #{seq1} and seq2= #{seq2} and seq3= #{seq3}
update cotdl.tbl_piisteptable set keymap_id= #{keymap_id, jdbcType=VARCHAR} where jobid= #{jobid, jdbcType=VARCHAR} and version= #{version, jdbcType=VARCHAR} and EXETYPE= 'KEYMAP'

update cotdl.tbl_piisteptable set pagitype= #{pagitype, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, pagitypedetail= #{pagitypedetail, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, exetype= #{exetype, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, archiveflag= #{archiveflag, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, status= #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, preceding= #{preceding, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, succedding= #{succedding, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, seq1= #{seq1}, seq2= #{seq2}, seq3= #{seq3}, pipeline= #{pipeline, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, pk_col= #{pk_col, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, where_col= #{where_col, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, where_key_name= #{where_key_name, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
commitcnt= #{commitcnt, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, wherestr= #{wherestr, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sqlstr= #{sqlstr, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, keymap_id= #{keymap_id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, key_name= #{key_name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, key_cols= #{key_cols, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, key_refstr= #{key_refstr, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sqltype= #{sqltype, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, regdate= str_to_date(#{regdate, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'%Y/%m/%d'), upddate= NOW(), reguserid= #{reguserid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, upduserid= #{upduserid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, hintselect= #{hintselect, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, hintinsert= #{hintinsert, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, uval1= #{uval1, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, uval2= #{uval2, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, uval3= #{uval3, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, uval4= #{uval4, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, uval5= #{uval5, jdbcType=VARCHAR} where jobid= #{jobid, jdbcType=VARCHAR} and version= #{version, jdbcType=VARCHAR} and stepid= #{stepid} and seq1= #{seq1} and seq2= #{seq2} and seq3= #{seq3}
mapper.select:
select jobid, version, stepid, db, owner, table_name, pagitype, pagitypedetail, exetype, archiveflag, status, preceding, succedding, seq1, seq2, seq3, pipeline, pk_col, where_col, where_key_name, parallelcnt, commitcnt, keymap_id, key_name, key_cols, key_refstr, sqltype, DATE_FORMAT(regdate,'%Y/%m/%d') as regdate, DATE_FORMAT(upddate,'%Y/%m/%d') as upddate, reguserid, upduserid, hintselect, hintinsert, uval1, uval2, uval3, uval4, uval5 from cotdl.tbl_piisteptable a where version in (select max(cast(version as INTEGER)) from cotdl.tbl_piisteptable where jobid = a.jobid and stepid = a.stepid )
order by jobid, stepid, seq1, seq2, seq3 limit #{offset}, #{amount}

select jobid, version, stepid, db, owner, table_name, pagitype, pagitypedetail, exetype, archiveflag, status, preceding, succedding, seq1, seq2, seq3, pipeline, pk_col, where_col, where_key_name, parallelcnt, commitcnt, wherestr, sqlstr, keymap_id, key_name, key_cols, key_refstr, sqltype, regdate, upddate, reguserid, upduserid, hintselect, hintinsert, uval1, uval2, uval3, uval4, uval5 ,db_w, owner_w, table_name_w, updates from ( select a.jobid, a.version, a.stepid, a.db, a.owner, a.table_name, a.pagitype, a.pagitypedetail, a.exetype, a.archiveflag, a.status, a.preceding, a.succedding, a.seq1, a.seq2, a.seq3, a.pipeline, a.pk_col, a.where_col, a.where_key_name, a.parallelcnt, a.commitcnt, a.wherestr, a.sqlstr, a.keymap_id, a.key_name, a.key_cols, a.key_refstr, a.sqltype, a.regdate, a.upddate, a.reguserid, a.upduserid, a.hintselect, a.hintinsert, a.uval1, a.uval2, a.uval3, a.uval4, a.uval5 ,b.db_w, b.owner_w, b.table_name_w, c.updates from ( select jobid, version, stepid, db, owner, table_name, pagitype, pagitypedetail, exetype, archiveflag, status, preceding, succedding, seq1, seq2, seq3, pipeline, pk_col, where_col, where_key_name, parallelcnt, commitcnt, wherestr, sqlstr, keymap_id, key_name, key_cols, key_refstr, sqltype, DATE_FORMAT(regdate,'%Y/%m/%d') as regdate, DATE_FORMAT(upddate,'%Y/%m/%d') as upddate, reguserid, upduserid, hintselect, hintinsert, uval1, uval2, uval3, uval4, uval5 from cotdl.tbl_piisteptable order by jobid, stepid, seq1, seq2, seq3 ) a left outer join cotdl.tbl_piisteptablewait b on (a.jobid= b.jobid and a.version= b.version and a.stepid= b.stepid and a.db= b.db and a.owner= b.owner and a.table_name= b.table_name ) left outer join ( select jobid, version, stepid, seq1, seq2, seq3 ,group_concat(concat(column_name,concat('=',update_val)) SEPARATOR ',') as updates from cotdl.tbl_piisteptableupdate group by jobid, version, stepid, seq1, seq2, seq3 ) c on (a.jobid= c.jobid and a.version= c.version and a.stepid= c.stepid and a.seq1= c.seq1 and a.seq2= c.seq2 and a.seq3= c.seq3 ) where a.version in (select max(cast(version as INTEGER)) from cotdl.tbl_piisteptable where jobid = a.jobid and stepid = a.stepid ) ) tmp where 1 = 1
order by jobid, stepid, seq1, seq2, seq3 limit #{offset}, #{amount}
select count(1) from cotdl.tbl_piisteptable a where version in (select max(cast(version as INTEGER)) from cotdl.tbl_piisteptable where jobid = a.jobid and stepid = a.stepid )

select count(1) from ( select db, owner, table_name from cotdl.tbl_piisteptable a where version in (select max(cast(version as INTEGER)) from cotdl.tbl_piisteptable where jobid = a.jobid and stepid = a.stepid ) and exetype in ('DELETE', 'UPDATE') group by db, owner, table_name ) f

select jobid, version, stepid ,max(seq1) as seq1, max(seq2) as seq2, max(seq3) as seq3 from cotdl.tbl_piisteptable a where jobid= #{jobid, jdbcType=VARCHAR} and version= #{version, jdbcType=VARCHAR} and stepid= #{stepid} and seq2<9000 group by jobid, version, stepid
select count(1) from cotdl.tbl_piisteptable a where jobid= #{jobid, jdbcType=VARCHAR} and version= #{version, jdbcType=VARCHAR} and stepid= #{stepid}

select a.jobid, a.version, a.stepid, a.exetype,count(1) as tablecnt from cotdl.tbl_piisteptable a, cotdl.tbl_piijob b where 1=1 and a.jobid = b.jobid and a.version = b.version and b.phase= 'CHECKIN' and b.status= 'ACTIVE' and b.version in (select max(cast(version as INTEGER)) from cotdl.tbl_piijob where jobid = a.jobid and phase= 'CHECKIN' and status= 'ACTIVE') group by a.jobid, a.version, a.stepid, a.exetype

select a.policy_id, a.jobid, b.exetype, count(b.table_name) as tablecnt from cotdl.tbl_piijob a, cotdl.tbl_piisteptable b where a.jobid = b.jobid and a.version = b.version and a.version in (select max(cast(version as INTEGER)) from cotdl.tbl_piijob where jobid = a.jobid and status = 'ACTIVE' ) and b.exetype in ('DELETE', 'UPDATE') group by a.policy_id, a.jobid, b.exetype order by a.policy_id, a.jobid, b.exetype

SELECT WHERE_COL AS whereCol, WHERE_KEY_NAME AS whereKeyName, WHERESTR AS whereStr FROM cotdl.tbl_piisteptable WHERE jobid = #{jobid} AND version = #{version} AND stepid = #{stepid} AND owner = #{owner} AND table_name = #{table_name}
